description: Behavioral task-class routing corpus; it evaluates policy judgments and does not enforce runtime dispatch.

cases.prompt: Inspect the authentication and billing modules independently, returning only file-backed findings and a stop condition for each surface.
Challenge this material, pre-approval migration plan and return only READY or REVISE with missing assumptions.
Before approval, inspect the proposed token-rotation design for security evidence; do not modify source files.
Apply this complete, approved rename specification across the listed files, update the prescribed tests, and run the named command.
Implement the approved bounded API feature with its done criteria, making the necessary local engineering choices.
Independently attempt to refute this completed non-trivial change by reproducing its tests and return only CONFIRMED or REFUTED.
Implement the approved authorization hardening contract after its security review, including the specified verification.
Correct the already-understood typo in one local README paragraph.
Trace and minimally fix one unknown bug whose diagnosis, state propagation, and verification share the same code path.
